query: double exposure ghostly silhouette overlapping portrait
message: sub:double_exposure — anti_aesthetic — overlapping ghostly portraits, doubled silhouettes, layered composites

response.objective_caption: An indistinct pale curved shape fills the right side of the frame, marked by a short perforated line near its upper edge. The rest of the image is consumed by deep shadow, leaving no clear subject or contextual details visible.
response.anti_aesthetic_caption: An indistinct pale curved shape fills the right side of the frame, its surfaces rendered with smeared, absent textures and no fine detail, dissolving into ambiguity rather than clear form. Extreme underexposure buries the remainder of the scene in impenetrable black shadow, while muted, washed-out tones and a complete abandonment of representational clarity push the image into abstraction, evoking atmospheric distress and unease.
